candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and equals Net sales in preview; appropriate as reported revenue line.
Not revenue; expense line.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Non-GAAP and empty; less preferred than reported revenue.
Also direct top-line revenue label; same values as Total Revenue and useful as alternate label across years.

variables.notes: Using reported revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label, even though preview values are empty; presence means reported in at least one year.
Also direct COGS/cost of sales label; useful alternate across years.
Production input cost component, but narrower than full COGS.
Balance sheet inventory component, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected direct cost-of-sales labels as a priority list; excluded Raw materials and consumables because it is only a component, not full COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row exists; per rule, prefer explicit SG&A row over components.
Overhead component and could supplement if explicit SG&A were unusable, but explicit SG&A exists.
Overhead component and could supplement if explicit SG&A were unusable, but explicit SG&A exists.
Possible overhead component, but empty and less clearly core SG&A than explicit SG&A.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists, so selected only that row per hierarchy rule (a).

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line on the income statement.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not period expense.
Amortization of capitalized R&D, not direct R&D expense.
Capitalized development on balance sheet, not direct expense.

variables.notes: Direct reported R&D expense found on the income statement.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if no specific interest expense is available.
Direct interest expense label, but preview empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most specific reported interest expense line with populated values; best match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Specific interest line, but only populated in 2025 in preview.
Only a component of interest/finance expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Lease-interest component only.
Not specifically interest expense.
Direct interest expense label, but preview empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component only.
Balance sheet asset, not interest expense.
Balance sheet liability/accrual, not interest expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific interest expense line first, then alternate direct labels, then broader financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement equity-accounting item, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Non-Recurring Portion of Equity Earnings before Taxes
candidates.why: Income statement item, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Result from revaluation of derivatives recognized in equity
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Result from remeasurement of derivatives recognized in equity
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Result from equity instruments measured at fair value
candidates.why: OCI/fair value item, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity owners of the Parent
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity owners of the Parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line selected to avoid double counting minority interests.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Comprehensive income attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity stock.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interests line.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; useful alternate across years.

variables.notes: Priority list uses balance sheet minority-interest labels only; excluded income statement attribution lines.
